description: This claim as stated is contradicted by the supplied data: {2,3,4,5} has Hausdorff dimension δ > 1/2 (per Hensley, approx. δ ≈ 0.71145) but its density at 10^9 is only 0.972937480. The finding is updated to explicitly state this, as well as the current status relative to BK14 and Hensley's conjecture.
